handover_from_previous.title: Reduced Speed Operation
handover_from_previous.description: Line 1 running at reduced speed due to vibration. Maintenance scheduled for next shift.

handover_from_previous.title: Sensor Calibration Needed
handover_from_previous.description: Optical sensor on Line 3 requires recalibration. No production impact currently.

handover_to_next.title: Noise Investigation Required
handover_to_next.description: Investigate unusual noise on Line 2 conveyor belt. Possibly bearing issue. Monitor closely during operation.

handover_to_next.title: Parts Ordered - Robot 1
handover_to_next.description: Replacement arm actuator ordered (PO#12345). Expected delivery Tuesday. Schedule installation during next maintenance window.

breakdowns.description: Seed Breakdown 1 - Robot Arm Stuck. Related to MO #101.
breakdowns.root_cause: Sensor malfunction causing position feedback error
breakdowns.resolution_notes: Reset controller and recalibrated position sensors

breakdowns.root_cause: Belt misalignment due to worn tensioner
breakdowns.resolution_notes: Parts ordered, temporary adjustment made to maintain operation

break_activities.title: Belt Replacement
break_activities.description: Replaced worn belt segment on Conveyor C1 due to excessive wear. Tensioner adjusted and alignment verified.

break_activities.title: Optical Sensor Maintenance
break_activities.description: Cleaned optical lens and recalibrated sensor S2. Replaced protective cover that was cracked.

engineering_support.title: Vibration Analysis
engineering_support.description: Engineering team conducted vibration analysis on Line 2. Found bearing misalignment. Replacement scheduled for next maintenance window. Full report available in shared drive.

engineering_support.title: Noise Investigation
engineering_support.description: Investigated unusual noise on packaging line. Identified loose mounting bracket. Tightened and verified operation.

handover_instructions: Verify Asset A calibration on Monday morning.
